---
title: "Your Name"
image: profile.jpg             # Drop a square picture of yourself in the main folder
about:
  template: jolla              # Clean layout templates: jolla, trestles, solana, or marquee
  links:
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/yourusername
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://linkedin.com/in/yourusername
---

Hello! I am a data analyst and software explorer building tools inside Linux environments. 

I use this space to document my technical logs and projects. Head over to the **Projects** menu above to see what I am actively building!
